reply:
[[BLOCK:p_67]]
Served as a design consultant for Baidu Search, iResearch Data, and multiple startup teams; appointed as a visiting professor at the School of Visual Arts, Fudan University, in 2015.

[[BLOCK:p_73]]
Design Philosophy

[[BLOCK:p_74]]
Advocates the principle that "art follows science, and form arises from cognition," aiming to introduce scientific research methodologies into internet design. This cutting-edge design philosophy has attracted a large following of designers across the country.

[[BLOCK:p_76]]
Corporate Client Services

[[BLOCK:p_77]]
Metro Service Design, Telecom Intelligent Voice Consulting, Hubei Telecom Design Consulting, Yangtai Airport Service Design Director, 集创堂 online education products, Baidu Search, mobile products, e-commerce products, educational products, Alipay facial recognition (KFC terminal), Xiaoyong Robot, Liangliang Smart Glasses, Lenovo Shenji Workshop, 2345 Movie Database, Hao123, financial products, and more.

[[BLOCK:p_82]]
Healing-Related Work:

[[BLOCK:p_83]]
Since 2019, began developing a healing system tailored for Chinese individuals, focusing on Life State Design (生命状态设计). Conducted nationwide courses, influencing over 250,000 people and training 5,000 healers.

[[BLOCK:p_84]]
From 2020 to 2025, organized Life Design Blueprint (人生设计图谱) events nationwide, addressing youth issues such as depression, hollow syndrome, and anxiety, and exploring solutions.

[[BLOCK:p_85]]
In 2023, created the first independently developed healing card system for Chinese healers—Spiritual Card Array (心灵牌阵). Also introduced Talent Guidance Cards (天赋指南卡) to support the development of natural talents among Chinese individuals.

[[BLOCK:p_86]]
In 2023, independently developed the Heaven-Human-Earth Three Paths Destiny Adjustment Philosophy (天人地三道改运理念) within the Life State Design framework, integrating perspectives from traditional Chinese studies, Yi studies, psychology, and design to improve life systems.
